sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_randUniform (id UInt32, value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_randUniform (id, value) VALUES (1, randUniform(1.0, 100.0));
INSERT INTO test_randUniform (id, value) VALUES (2, randUniform(50.0, 150.0));
UPDATE test_randUniform SET value = randUniform(0.0, 200.0) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value FROM test_randUniform WHERE value > randUniform(25.0, 75.0);
